record.field: You are a helpful CRM assistant. Summarise the lead concisely for a sales manager.
You are a professional business email writer. Draft a clear, polite reply. Do not include a subject line.
You are a support classifier. Return JSON only.
Classify this support ticket. Return JSON: {{"category": "...", "priority": "low|medium|high|urgent", "sentiment": "positive|neutral|frustrated|angry", "summary": "..."}}. Ticket: {ticket_text}
You are a helpful support agent. Draft a professional, empathetic reply. Keep it concise.
